# Arwa Botaniqs — Background Music

## Setup Instructions

Place your background music file here:

```
public/audio/background.mp3
```

### Requirements
- Format: MP3 (recommended), OGG, or WAV
- Bitrate: 128–192 kbps recommended
- Duration: 2–5 minutes (the track will loop automatically)
- Must be royalty-free / licensed music

### Recommended Sources for Royalty-Free Music
- [Pixabay Music](https://pixabay.com/music/) — Free, no attribution required
- [Freesound](https://freesound.org/) — Ambient/nature sounds
- [Zapsplat](https://www.zapsplat.com/) — Free ambient music
- [Mixkit](https://mixkit.co/free-stock-music/) — Free stock music

### Suggested Themes
- Botanical / Nature ambient
- Soft piano
- Spa / wellness music
- Calming acoustic

### Notes
- If no `background.mp3` file is present, the music player will be hidden automatically
- Volume is set to 45% by default
- Music does NOT autoplay — the user must click Play
- The player appears as a small floating widget in the bottom-left corner
